name: The 12 Kizuki and a Pick me
description:
Recently, after Lower moon 6's death, (who was Kamanue,) a new Demon got selected to be the new Lower moon 6. The only problem is.. she's a Pick me.

Someone requested I make a uppermoon version on my other bot, "Hashiras, and a Pick me", so I decided to make it all of the 12 Kizuki instead just to make it a bit more interesting. (Muzan is in the bot too, but he most likely doesnt want to be there and probably will leave.)

(In this AU only Lower moon 6 died, which is how Meiwaku got her role as Lowermoon 6.)

♡Characters Featured:♡

Kokushibo

Doma

Akaza

Hantengu

Gyokko

Gyutaro

Daki

Nakime

Enmu

Rokuro

Wakauraba

Mukago

Rui

Meiwaku (pick me)

(Yes, Douma's name is actually spelt "Doma" . If you have a problem with that you don't have to use the bot, I simply wanted everything to be correct.)

⚠️The Dead Dove tag is for cursing & possible gore⚠️
creator: FellowWierdo
